scripts.check:compat: pnpm run build && pnpm run check:events && vitest run test/integration/schema-compatibility-smoke.test.ts
scripts.docker:start: sh -c 'docker start shift-indexer-postgres || docker run -d --name shift-indexer-postgres -e POSTGRES_USER=postgres -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres -e POSTGRES_DB=ponder -p 5432:5432 -v shift-indexer-postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data postgres:18'
